description: The contract must clearly state how personal data is collected, processed, and the specific purpose for storage.

requirement: Right to Erasure (Right to be Forgotten)
description: The agreement must include a provision allowing the data subject to request deletion of their data.
Employment contracts must provide a minimum notice period of 30 days for termination unless for gross misconduct.
Interest rates for late payments must not exceed the statutory limit (typically 8% above base rate).
